# Changelog - Nashik Kumbh Navigator

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [1.0.0] - 2026-07-09

### Added - Official Production Release (Simhastha 2027)
- **Live Crowd-Aware Navigation**: Turn-by-turn walking & shuttle navigation across Ramkund, Kushavarta Ghat, Sadhugram, and Trimbakeshwar sector gates.
- **Dynamic Heatmaps**: Real-time crowd density heatmaps (Green / Yellow / Red) routing pilgrims away from bottleneck corridors.
- **One-Tap SOS 108 Emergency System**: Instant location and alert dispatch to Police (100), Medical Emergency (108), and Disaster Management Control Room (1070).
- **Shahi Snan Bathing Muhurat Timers**: Complete schedules and countdown timers for the Three Royal Shahi Snan dates.
- **Multilingual Support**: English, Hindi (हिन्दी), and Marathi (मराठी) localization.
- **Offline-First Resilience**: Cached sector maps and emergency directories available offline.
- **Elderly & Accessibility Modes**: High-contrast theme and large typography options.

### Security & Compliance
- **Signed Release Artifacts**: Permanent RSA 2048-bit release keystore signature.
- **Transport Security**: Enforced HTTPS/TLS 1.3 (`usesCleartextTraffic="false"`).
- **Store Compliance**: Full Android 14 (API 34/35) compatibility, 64-bit (`arm64-v8a`) + 32-bit (`armeabi-v7a`) split APKs, and 16KB memory page size support.
